assertions.expectation: Recommends combining release channels with maintenance exclusions as the approach for maximum control
assertions.reason: Response clearly recommends Extended channel combined with 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion as the primary approach for maximum control

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion to prevent disruptive changes while allowing control plane security patches. May also mention persistent exclusions with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support (no longer a 6-month max, auto-tracks EoS)
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' exclusion and includes the --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support flag with explanation that it auto-tracks EoS

assertions.expectation: Recommends maintenance windows to control WHEN patches are applied (e.g., weekend windows only)
assertions.reason: Response includes specific maintenance window configuration with Saturday 2-6 AM timing and provides the exact gcloud commands for setting maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Mentions the cluster disruption budget (disruption interval) to control upgrade frequency — patch interval default 7d (max 90d), minor interval default 30d (max 90d)
assertions.reason: Response includes --maintenance-patch-version-disruption-interval=7776000s (90 days) and mentions '90-day maximum interval between control plane patches'

assertions.expectation: Suggests Stable or Extended channel for production clusters in regulated environments. Extended channel provides maximum flexibility around EoS enforcement (additional cost only during extended period)
assertions.reason: Response recommends Extended channel specifically and mentions '24-month support period' and 'cost only during extended period' for financial services regulated environment

assertions.expectation: Notes that disabling control plane patches entirely is not recommended due to security risks — monthly patches at minimum
assertions.reason: Response warns against blocking all upgrades with '⚠️ Warning: This creates security debt' and notes that patches must be applied within 30 days when using complete exclusions

assertions.expectation: May mention rollout sequencing as an advanced option for controlling upgrade order across multiple clusters, and/or the cluster disruption budget for controlling CP patch frequency
assertions.reason: Response includes rollout sequencing example with fleet clusterupgrade commands for dev→prod progression and mentions cluster disruption budget for patch frequency control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for configuring the recommended exclusion type and maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands including the recommended exclusion configuration, maintenance window settings, and all necessary flags
